name: agi_experience_eval_v1
description: Baseline-vs-evolved checks with memory hierarchy probes (sensory, working, long-term, symbolic) and structured uncertainty reporting.

prompts.text: Remember token SKY-314 and reply with: stored.
What token did I ask you to remember? Reply token only.
For this session, set color=blue and reply acknowledged.
In this session, what is the color value? Reply value only.
What was my first message in this session? Include the key token.
How many entries are in symbolic memory now? Reply number only.
Summarize this session in one line.
